title: T-027 — UI: Analytics Hub + Settings page (MNT-031, MNT-032)
prompt:
# T-027 — Maintenance Analytics + Settings

PRD: docs/prd/13-MAINTENANCE-PRD.md §10.3 MNT-031, MNT-032, §9.16 maintenance_kpis, §13.2 L2 config
UX: prototypes/design/13-MAINTENANCE-UX.md:832-922
Prototypes: other-screens.jsx:601-803 (maintenance_analytics_page); other-screens.jsx:805-964 (maintenance_settings_page)
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Route `/maintenance/analytics` (6-tab analytics hub consuming maintenance_kpis MV + 15-OEE oee_shift_metrics cross-module) and `/maintenance/settings` (module-level config persisted to maintenance_settings + reference tables).

## Implementation contract
1. `apps/web/app/maintenance/analytics/page.tsx` — RSC; 6 tabs (Overview/MTBF-MTTR/PM Compliance/Availability/Cost/Pareto) — each is Suspense boundary with its own Drizzle query. Recharts (`packages/ui` Chart wrapper) for line/bar/Pareto. Data-source banner on MTBF/MTTR tab: "Sourced from 15-OEE. Maintenance does not compute independently" per D-MNT-3.
2. `apps/web/app/maintenance/settings/page.tsx` — RSC; left-nav sections General/Criticality/Auto-WR/Sanitation-Cal/LOTO/OEE Trigger (disabled with P2 Alert)/Skill Catalog/Notifications.
3. Settings persisted to `maintenance_settings` + `criticality_taxonomy` rows + notification_preferences. OEE Trigger toggle is read-only with P2 Alert per BL-MAINT-06 (D-MNT-11 feature flag).
4. RBAC: Settings is manager+admin only (`mnt.mwo.assign` tier + Foundation `settings.org.update`); Reset to Defaults is admin only.
5. CSV export from Analytics streams via Server Action.
6. Empty/loading/error/permission states + i18n (`maintenance.analytics.*`, `maintenance.settings.*`).

## Prototype parity
- Analytics 6-tab + date-range selector + filter bar + Recharts charts + Top 5 Problem Assets + Pareto — RTL snapshot other-screens.jsx:601-803.
- Settings 8-section left-nav + General Defaults form + Criticality drag-to-reorder + LOTO policy Select + OEE Trigger P2 alert + Notifications useFieldArray — snapshot other-screens.jsx:805-964.

## Files
- apps/web/app/maintenance/analytics/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/maintenance/analytics/_components/analytics-tabs.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/maintenance/analytics/_components/pareto-chart.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/maintenance/settings/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/maintenance/settings/_components/settings-form.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/maintenance/analytics/_components/__tests__/analytics.test.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/maintenance/settings/_components/__tests__/settings.test.tsx [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given analytics renders, when compared to other-screens.jsx:601-803, then 6 tabs + date-range selector + filter bar + Top 5 Problem Assets + Pareto chart match by RTL parity checklist.
2. Given MTBF/MTTR tab renders, when inspected, then data-source banner "Sourced from 15-OEE" is present per D-MNT-3 (no maintenance-side MTBF computation).
3. Given settings renders, when compared to other-screens.jsx:805-964, then 8 left-nav sections + General Defaults + Criticality drag-to-reorder + LOTO policy + OEE Trigger P2 alert + Notifications match.
4. Given Reset to Defaults called by admin, when settled, then maintenance_settings rows reseeded to defaults via T-013 seed.
5. Given Reset to Defaults called by manager (not admin), when settled, then 403 PERMISSION_DENIED.
6. Given closeout, when reviewers inspect, then Playwright trace + screenshots attached per UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md.

## Test strategy
- RED: RTL parity + Playwright e2e for analytics tab nav + settings form save.
- Run `pnpm --filter @monopilot/web vitest run apps/web/app/maintenance/{analytics,settings}`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not compute MTBF/MTTR independently — read from 15-OEE per D-MNT-3.
- Do not enable OEE Trigger toggle (BL-MAINT-06 + D-MNT-11 feature flag).
- Do not allow non-admin Reset to Defaults.
- Do not paste prototype JSX verbatim.
- Do not bypass RBAC server-side.
- Do not omit empty/loading/error/permission states.
